no_gaps_directive.primitive: Keep the existing rank-2 axis-1 I64 scalar Add vmap fusion but emit dense I64 output and borrow dense I64 input when available.

profile_backed_target.bead_source: frankenjax-z92vn was filed after pass125 reprofile found dispatch_latency/vmap/rank2_add_one_in_axes_1 still at roughly 42us on ts2.
profile_backed_target.fresh_baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-z92vn-baseline-20260605 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- dispatch_latency/vmap/rank2_add_one_in_axes_1 --sample-size 100 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

optimization.lever: Inside fuse_rank2_axis1_i64_scalar_add_move_to_front, collect transposed wrapping-add results as Vec<i64>, use as_i64_slice when the input is dense-backed, and construct the output with TensorValue::new_i64_values instead of Vec<Literal> plus TensorValue::new.
optimization.guard: Primitive::Add, batch_dim == 1, batched value is rank-2 DType::I64 tensor, scalar value is Literal::I64, and fallback to the existing literal validation remains for literal-backed tensors.
optimization.fallback: All non-matching primitive, dtype, rank, axis, non-scalar, and malformed-literal cases continue to return None and use the existing generic path.

candidate_ts1_provisional.note: Cross-worker result was treated as provisional only.

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-z92vn-candidate2-20260605 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- dispatch_latency/vmap/rank2_add_one_in_axes_1 --sample-size 100 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Yes. The loop still emits output[col,row] from source[row,col], matching the prior axis-1 move-to-front layout and default out_axes=0 row-major output order.
isomorphism_proof.arithmetic: I64 addition remains value.wrapping_add(scalar) for every accepted element.
isomorphism_proof.shape_and_dtype: Output shape remains [cols, rows] and dtype remains DType::I64. Only the internal LiteralBuffer storage changes to dense I64.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A. Add has no comparisons or ties.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: N/A for this optimized guard. Floating-point paths are excluded by DType::I64 and Literal::I64 checks.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A. No random state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.error_behavior: Malformed literal-backed I64 tensors still return None and use the existing fallback; all other rejected cases are unchanged.
